nodes.name: Stilpnia
nodes.summary: Stilpnia（Stilpnia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Black-headed tanager、Black-capped tanager、Straw-backed tanager等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: Scrub tanager
nodes.summary: The scrub tanager (Stilpnia vitriolina) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, and heavily degraded former forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The scrub tanager (Stilpnia vitriolina) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador.
